important_files.description: Defines scripts, dependencies, Jest config, and lint-staged setup.
Expo app metadata, native IDs, plugins, EAS project, and updates config.
Initializes SQLite, handles biometric lock, and mounts providers/navigation.
Registers the Expo root component.
Auth-aware root stack navigator for login, main app, modals, and reports.
Authenticated bottom-tab navigator for dashboard, transactions, budgets, goals, reports, and settings.
Typed route names and params for navigation.
SQLite open/init logic, schema creation, migrations, and indexes.
Shared SQLite query helpers for categories, payees, stats, and related data.
Transaction CRUD, date lookups, net worth, and sync-status helpers.
SQLite aggregation queries for report screens.
Core TypeScript interfaces for app entities and report data.
Supabase session state plus sign-in, sign-out, and post-login sync.
Light/dark theme colors and persisted theme preference.
Supabase client configuration with AsyncStorage-backed auth.
Coordinates full sync and entity-level push/pull operations.
Shared sync helpers for connectivity and logging.
Transaction-specific Supabase synchronization.
Transaction list fetching, filtering, stats, and FlashList mapping.
Dashboard metrics and financial calculations.
Service layer for report data retrieval.
Loads dashboard metrics for the current user.
Manages dashboard sync state and manual/initial sync actions.

architecture.src/screens: Top-level screens for dashboard, transactions, budgets, goals, reports, settings, auth, and setup flows.
architecture.src/components: Reusable UI components grouped by feature plus shared common components.
architecture.src/navigation: React Navigation stack/tab setup and route typing.
architecture.src/store: React contexts for auth, theme, and toast state.
architecture.src/db: SQLite database initialization and query modules.
architecture.src/services: Business/data services plus Supabase sync orchestration.
architecture.src/hooks: Feature and screen hooks for data loading, filtering, sync, and settings.
architecture.src/utils: Date, formatting, validation, mapping, timestamp, and logging helpers.
architecture.src/styles: Shared spacing, typography, layout, card, and common style primitives.
architecture.src/constants: Shared constants for tables, sync, and app values.
architecture.__tests__: Jest tests for services, utilities, queries, and components.
architecture.__mocks__: Mocks for Jest, including Expo SQLite.
architecture.assets: Expo app icons and splash/favicon assets.
architecture.android: Generated/native Android project for Expo native builds.

rules: Do NOT scan entire codebase unless required
Preserve offline-first SQLite behavior when changing data flows
Keep Supabase sync status and soft-delete fields consistent
Use existing hooks/services before adding new screen-level data logic
Use shared styles from src/styles and theme colors from ThemeContext
Update navigation types when adding or changing routes
Add or update focused Jest tests for query, service, or utility changes
